-- Hoogle documentation, generated by Haddock
-- See Hoogle, http://www.haskell.org/hoogle/


-- | A package with tools for working with Poseidon genotype data
--   
--   The tools in this package read and analyse Poseidon-formatted genotype
--   databases, a modular system for storing genotype data from thousands
--   of individuals.
@package poseidon-hs
@version 2.0.0.0

module Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Types
data IndConcrete
IndConcrete :: String -> String -> [PopFracConcrete] -> IndConcrete
[_indName] :: IndConcrete -> String
[_groupName] :: IndConcrete -> String
[_popSet] :: IndConcrete -> [PopFracConcrete]
data PopFracConcrete
PopFracConcrete :: String -> Rational -> [(String, Int)] -> PopFracConcrete
[_popName] :: PopFracConcrete -> String
[_popFrac] :: PopFracConcrete -> Rational
[_popInds] :: PopFracConcrete -> [(String, Int)]
data RequestedInd
RequestedInd :: String -> String -> [PopFrac] -> RequestedInd
[_inIndName] :: RequestedInd -> String
[_inGroupName] :: RequestedInd -> String
[_inPopSet] :: RequestedInd -> [PopFrac]
data PopFrac
PopFrac :: String -> Rational -> PopFrac
[_inPopName] :: PopFrac -> String
[_inPopFrac] :: PopFrac -> Rational
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Types.PopFracConcrete
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Types.IndConcrete
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Types.RequestedInd
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Types.PopFrac

module Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Utils
data PoseidonGeneratorException
PoseidonGeneratorCLIParsingException :: String -> PoseidonGeneratorException
extractFirst :: (a, b, c) -> a
zipGroup :: [a] -> [[b]] -> [(Int, a, b)]
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Utils.PoseidonGeneratorException
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Utils.PoseidonGeneratorException

module Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.Parsers
renderRequestedInds :: [RequestedInd] -> String
readIndWithAdmixtureSetString :: String -> Either String [RequestedInd]
readIndWithAdmixtureSetFromFile :: FilePath -> IO [RequestedInd]
indWithAdmixtureSetMultiParser :: Parser [RequestedInd]
parseIndWithAdmixtureSet :: Parser RequestedInd
populationWithFractionMultiParser :: Parser [PopFrac]
parsePopulationWithFraction :: Parser PopFrac

module Poseidon.Core.AccessionIDs

-- | A datatype to represent AccessionIDs in a ssf file
data AccessionID
INSDCProject :: Text -> AccessionID
INSDCStudy :: Text -> AccessionID
INSDCBioSample :: Text -> AccessionID
INSDCSample :: Text -> AccessionID
INSDCExperiment :: Text -> AccessionID
INSDCRun :: Text -> AccessionID
INSDCAnalysis :: Text -> AccessionID
OtherID :: Text -> AccessionID
makeAccessionID :: MonadFail m => Text -> m AccessionID
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.AccessionIDs.AccessionID
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.AccessionIDs.AccessionID
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.AccessionIDs.AccessionID
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.AccessionIDs.AccessionID

module Poseidon.Core.MathHelpers

-- | A helper function to calculate the mean of a list of doubles
avg :: [Double] -> Double

-- | A helper function to round doubles
roundTo :: Int -> Double -> Double

-- | A helper function to print rounded doubles
roundToStr :: (PrintfArg a, Floating a) => Int -> a -> String

-- | A helper function to calculate the standard deviation of a list of
--   doubles
stdev :: [Double] -> Double

-- | A helper function to get a nice string with mean and sd for a list of
--   doubles
meanAndSdRoundTo :: Int -> [Double] -> String

-- | A helper function to get a nice string with mean and sd for a list of
--   doubles (here rounded to integer)
meanAndSdInteger :: [Double] -> String

newtype PoseidonVersion
PoseidonVersion :: Version -> PoseidonVersion
validPoseidonVersions :: [PoseidonVersion]
latestPoseidonVersion :: PoseidonVersion
asVersion :: PoseidonVersion -> Version
showPoseidonVersion :: PoseidonVersion -> String
minimalRequiredClientVersion :: Version
data VersionedFile
VersionedFile :: PoseidonVersion -> FilePath -> VersionedFile
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.PoseidonVersion.PoseidonVersion
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.PoseidonVersion.PoseidonVersion

module Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils
class FromFieldVersioned a
parseFieldVersioned :: FromFieldVersioned a => PoseidonVersion -> Field -> Parser a
class Makeable a
make :: (Makeable a, MonadFail m) => PoseidonVersion -> Text -> m a
class Suspicious a
inspect :: Suspicious a => a -> Maybe [String]
inspectEachField :: (Generic a, Code a ~ '[xs], All Suspicious xs) => a -> [Maybe [String]]
parseTypeCSV :: forall a m. (MonadFail m, Makeable a, Typeable a) => PoseidonVersion -> String -> ByteString -> m a
makeInstances :: Name -> String -> DecsQ
decodingOptions :: DecodeOptions
encodingOptions :: EncodeOptions

-- | A data type for row-wise cross-column consistency checks in either
--   .janno or .ssf
type RowLog = ExceptT String (Writer [String])
getCellLength :: Maybe (ListColumn a) -> Int
allEqual :: Eq a => [a] -> Bool

-- | A datatype to collect additional, unpecified .csv<i>.tsv file columns
--   (a hashmap in cassava</i>Data.Csv)
newtype CsvNamedRecord
CsvNamedRecord :: NamedRecord -> CsvNamedRecord
getCsvNR :: CsvNamedRecord -> NamedRecord
checkMandatory :: NamedRecord -> ByteString -> Parser ()
filterLookup :: FromFieldVersioned a => PoseidonVersion -> NamedRecord -> ByteString -> Parser a
filterLookupOptional :: FromFieldVersioned a => PoseidonVersion -> NamedRecord -> ByteString -> Parser (Maybe a)
cleanInput :: Maybe ByteString -> Maybe ByteString
explicitNA :: NamedRecord -> NamedRecord

-- | A general datatype for janno list columns
newtype ListColumn a
ListColumn :: [a] -> ListColumn a
[getListColumn] :: ListColumn a -> [a]
getMaybeListColumn :: Maybe (ListColumn a) -> [a]
removeUselessSuffix :: String -> String
data CsvParseError
CsvParseError :: String -> String -> String -> CsvParseError
[_expected] :: CsvParseError -> String
[_actual] :: CsvParseError -> String
[_leftover] :: CsvParseError -> String
parseCsvParseError :: Parser CsvParseError
renderCsvParseError :: CsvParseError -> String
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.CsvNamedRecord
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.CsvNamedRecord
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.CsvNamedRecord
instance GHC.Show.Show a => GHC.Show.Show (Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.ListColumn a)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.ListColumn a)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord a => GHC.Classes.Ord (Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.ListColumn a)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq a => GHC.Classes.Eq (Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.ListColumn a)
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.CsvParseError
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious a => Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious (Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.ListColumn a)
instance (Data.Csv.Conversion.ToField a, GHC.Show.Show a) => Data.Csv.Conversion.ToField (Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.ListColumn a)
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.FromFieldVersioned a => Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.FromFieldVersioned (Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.ListColumn a)
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.CsvNamedRecord
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious GHC.Base.String

instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDStudy
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDStudy
instance Data.Csv.Conversion.ToField Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDStudy
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.FromFieldVersioned Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDStudy
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Makeable Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDSample
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDSample
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDSample
instance Data.Csv.Conversion.ToField Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDSample
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.FromFieldVersioned Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFAccessionIDSample
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Makeable Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFLibraryBuilt
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFLibraryBuilt
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFLibraryBuilt
instance Data.Csv.Conversion.ToField Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFLibraryBuilt
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.FromFieldVersioned Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFLibraryBuilt
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Makeable Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFUDG
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFUDG
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFUDG
instance Data.Csv.Conversion.ToField Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFUDG
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.FromFieldVersioned Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesSSF.SSFUDG

module Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno

-- | A datatype for the Genetic_Sex .janno column
newtype GeneticSex
GeneticSex :: Sex -> GeneticSex
[sfSex] :: GeneticSex -> Sex
newtype PoseidonID
PoseidonID :: ByteString -> PoseidonID
[unPoseidonID] :: PoseidonID -> ByteString
isRecommendedPoseidonIDChar :: Char -> Bool

-- | A datatype for the Group_Name .janno column
newtype GroupName
GroupName :: ByteString -> GroupName
[unGroupName] :: GroupName -> ByteString

-- | A datatype for the Individual_ID .janno column
newtype JannoIndividualID
JannoIndividualID :: Text -> JannoIndividualID

-- | A datatype for the Species .janno column
newtype JannoSpecies
JannoSpecies :: Text -> JannoSpecies

-- | A datatype for the Alternative_IDs .janno column
newtype JannoAlternativeID
JannoAlternativeID :: Text -> JannoAlternativeID

-- | A datatype for the Alternative_IDs_Context .janno column
newtype JannoAlternativeIDContext
JannoAlternativeIDContext :: Text -> JannoAlternativeIDContext

-- | A datatype for the Relation_To .janno column
newtype JannoRelationTo
JannoRelationTo :: Text -> JannoRelationTo

-- | A datatype for the Relation_Degree .janno column
data JannoRelationDegree
Identical :: JannoRelationDegree
First :: JannoRelationDegree
Second :: JannoRelationDegree
ThirdToFifth :: JannoRelationDegree
SixthToTenth :: JannoRelationDegree
Unrelated :: JannoRelationDegree
OtherDegree :: JannoRelationDegree

-- | A datatype for the Relation_Type .janno column
newtype JannoRelationType
JannoRelationType :: Text -> JannoRelationType

-- | A datatype for the Collection_ID .janno column
newtype JannoCollectionID
JannoCollectionID :: Text -> JannoCollectionID

-- | A datatype for the Custodian_Institution .janno column
newtype JannoCustodianInstitution
JannoCustodianInstitution :: Text -> JannoCustodianInstitution

-- | A datatype for the Cultural_Era .janno column
newtype JannoCulturalEra
JannoCulturalEra :: Text -> JannoCulturalEra

-- | A datatype for the Cultural_Era_URL .janno column
newtype JannoCulturalEraURL
JannoCulturalEraURL :: Text -> JannoCulturalEraURL

-- | A datatype for the Archaeological_Culture .janno column
newtype JannoArchaeologicalCulture
JannoArchaeologicalCulture :: Text -> JannoArchaeologicalCulture

-- | A datatype for the Archaeological_Culture_URL .janno column
newtype JannoArchaeologicalCultureURL
JannoArchaeologicalCultureURL :: Text -> JannoArchaeologicalCultureURL

-- | A datatype for the Country .janno column
newtype JannoCountry
JannoCountry :: Text -> JannoCountry

-- | A datatype for countries in ISO-alpha2 code format
newtype JannoCountryISO
JannoCountryISO :: Country -> JannoCountryISO

-- | A datatype for the Location .janno column
newtype JannoLocation
JannoLocation :: Text -> JannoLocation

-- | A datatype for the Site .janno column
newtype JannoSite
JannoSite :: Text -> JannoSite

-- | A datatype for the Latitude .janno column
newtype JannoLatitude
JannoLatitude :: Double -> JannoLatitude

-- | A datatype for the Longitude .janno column
newtype JannoLongitude
JannoLongitude :: Double -> JannoLongitude

-- | A datatype for the Date_Type .janno column
data JannoDateType
C14 :: JannoDateType
Contextual :: JannoDateType
Modern :: JannoDateType

-- | A datatype for the Date_C14_Labnr .janno column
newtype JannoDateC14Labnr
JannoDateC14Labnr :: Text -> JannoDateC14Labnr

-- | A datatype for the Date_C14_Uncal_BP .janno column
newtype JannoDateC14UncalBP
JannoDateC14UncalBP :: Int -> JannoDateC14UncalBP

-- | A datatype for the Date_C14_Uncal_BP_Err .janno column
newtype JannoDateC14UncalBPErr
JannoDateC14UncalBPErr :: Int -> JannoDateC14UncalBPErr

-- | A datatype for the Date_BC_AD_Start .janno column
newtype JannoDateBCADStart
JannoDateBCADStart :: Int -> JannoDateBCADStart

-- | A datatype for the Date_BC_AD_Median .janno column
newtype JannoDateBCADMedian
JannoDateBCADMedian :: Int -> JannoDateBCADMedian

-- | A datatype for the Date_BC_AD_Stop .janno column
newtype JannoDateBCADStop
JannoDateBCADStop :: Int -> JannoDateBCADStop

-- | A datatype for the Chromosomal_Anomalies .janno column
newtype JannoChromosomalAnomalies
JannoChromosomalAnomalies :: Text -> JannoChromosomalAnomalies

-- | A datatype for the MT_Haplogroup .janno column
newtype JannoMTHaplogroup
JannoMTHaplogroup :: Text -> JannoMTHaplogroup

-- | A datatype for the Y_Haplogroup .janno column
newtype JannoYHaplogroup
JannoYHaplogroup :: Text -> JannoYHaplogroup

-- | A datatype for the Source_Material .janno column
data JannoSourceMaterial
MaterialPetrous :: JannoSourceMaterial
MaterialBone :: JannoSourceMaterial
MaterialTooth :: JannoSourceMaterial
MaterialHair :: JannoSourceMaterial
MaterialSoft :: JannoSourceMaterial
MaterialSediment :: JannoSourceMaterial
MaterialOther :: JannoSourceMaterial

-- | A datatype for the Nr_Libraries .janno column
newtype JannoNrLibraries
JannoNrLibraries :: Int -> JannoNrLibraries

-- | A datatype for the Library_Names .janno column
newtype JannoLibraryName
JannoLibraryName :: Text -> JannoLibraryName

-- | A datatype for the Capture_Type .janno column
data JannoCaptureType
Shotgun :: JannoCaptureType
A1240K :: JannoCaptureType
ArborComplete :: JannoCaptureType
ArborPrimePlus :: JannoCaptureType
ArborAncestralPlus :: JannoCaptureType
TwistAncientDNA :: JannoCaptureType
WISC2013 :: JannoCaptureType
OtherCapture :: JannoCaptureType
LegacyReferenceGenome :: JannoCaptureType

-- | A datatype for the UDG .janno column
data JannoUDG
Minus :: JannoUDG
Half :: JannoUDG
Plus :: JannoUDG
Mixed :: JannoUDG

-- | A datatype for the Library_Built .janno column
data JannoLibraryBuilt
DS :: JannoLibraryBuilt
SS :: JannoLibraryBuilt
MixedSSDS :: JannoLibraryBuilt
Other :: JannoLibraryBuilt

-- | A datatype for the Genotype_Ploidy .janno column
data JannoGenotypePloidy
Diploid :: JannoGenotypePloidy
Haploid :: JannoGenotypePloidy

-- | A datatype for the Genotype_Ploidy .janno column
newtype JannoDataPreparationPipelineURL
JannoDataPreparationPipelineURL :: Text -> JannoDataPreparationPipelineURL

-- | A datatype for the Endogenous .janno column
newtype JannoEndogenous
JannoEndogenous :: Double -> JannoEndogenous

-- | A datatype for the Nr_SNPs .janno column
newtype JannoNrSNPs
JannoNrSNPs :: Int -> JannoNrSNPs

-- | A datatype for the Coverage_on_Target_SNPs .janno column
newtype JannoCoverageOnTargets
JannoCoverageOnTargets :: Double -> JannoCoverageOnTargets

-- | A datatype for the Damage .janno column
newtype JannoDamage
JannoDamage :: Double -> JannoDamage

-- | A datatype for the Contamination .janno column
newtype JannoContamination
JannoContamination :: Text -> JannoContamination

-- | A datatype for the Contamination_Err .janno column
newtype JannoContaminationErr
JannoContaminationErr :: Text -> JannoContaminationErr

-- | A datatype for the Contamination_Meas .janno column
newtype JannoContaminationMeas

-- | A datatype for the Genetic_Source_Accession_IDs .janno column
newtype JannoGeneticSourceAccessionID

-- | A datatype for the Primary_Contact .janno column
newtype JannoPrimaryContact

-- | A datatype for the Publication .janno column
newtype JannoPublication
JannoPublication :: Text -> JannoPublication

-- | A datatype for the Note .janno column
newtype JannoComment
JannoComment :: Text -> JannoComment

-- | A datatype for the Keywords .janno column
newtype JannoKeyword
JannoKeyword :: Text -> JannoKeyword

instance Data.Csv.Conversion.ToField Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoMTHaplogroup
instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.FromFieldVersioned Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoMTHaplogroup
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoMTHaplogroup
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoMTHaplogroup

instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.Suspicious Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoChromosomalAnomalies
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoChromosomalAnomalies

instance Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.FromFieldVersioned Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoChromosomalAnomalies

instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoDateC14UncalBP
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.JannoDateC14UncalBP

module Poseidon.Core.ServerStylesheet
stylesBS :: ByteString

module Poseidon.Core.Utils

-- | A Poseidon Exception data type with several concrete constructors
data PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent YAML parsing errors
PoseidonYamlParseException :: FilePath -> ParseException -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent a logical error in a package
PoseidonPackageException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent an issue with a package version
PoseidonPackageVersionException :: FilePath -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate a missing poseidonVersion field
PoseidonPackageMissingVersionException :: FilePath -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent an error when searching for individuals or
--   populations
PoseidonIndSearchException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors in the genotype data
PoseidonGenotypeException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors in the genotype data forwarded from
--   the sequence-formats library
PoseidonGenotypeExceptionForward :: ErrorLength -> SomeException -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors in the remote data loading forwarded
--   from simpleHttp
PoseidonHttpExceptionForward :: HttpException -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors when trying to parse the janno or
--   seqSource file
PoseidonFileRowException :: FilePath -> String -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent consistency errors in janno or seqSource
--   files
PoseidonFileConsistencyException :: FilePath -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent inconsistencies across multiple files in a
--   package
PoseidonCrossFileConsistencyException :: String -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent logical issues in a poseidon package
--   Collection
PoseidonCollectionException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent missing files
PoseidonFileExistenceException :: FilePath -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent failed checksum tests
PoseidonFileChecksumException :: FilePath -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception type to represent FStat specification errors
PoseidonFStatsFormatException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors when trying to parse the .bib file
PoseidonBibTeXException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate failed entity parsing
PoseidonPoseidonEntityParsingException :: ParseError -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate issues in the forge selection
PoseidonForgeEntitiesException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to throw if there is nothing to be forged
PoseidonEmptyForgeException :: PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate an issue in newPackageTemplate
PoseidonNewPackageConstructionException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate failed remote info JSON parsing
PoseidonRemoteJSONParsingException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | A catch-all for any other type of exception
PoseidonGenericException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to throw if the output package lacks a name
PoseidonEmptyOutPacNameException :: PoseidonException

-- | An exception to throw if genotype data files don't share a common base
--   directory
PoseidonUnequalBaseDirException :: FilePath -> FilePath -> FilePath -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to mark server communication errors
PoseidonServerCommunicationException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception for unzipping issues in fetch
PoseidonUnzipException :: SomeException -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception for issues in chronicle
PoseidonChronicleException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception for issues with git
PoseidonGitException :: FilePath -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception for issues with --preservePyml
PoseidonCantPreserveException :: PoseidonException
renderPoseidonException :: PoseidonException -> String
usePoseidonLogger :: LogMode -> TestMode -> PlinkPopNameMode -> ErrorLength -> PoseidonIO a -> IO a
testLog :: PoseidonIO a -> IO a
testLogErr :: PoseidonIO a -> IO a
type PoseidonIO = ReaderT Env IO
envLogAction :: PoseidonIO LogA
envInputPlinkMode :: PoseidonIO PlinkPopNameMode
envErrorLength :: PoseidonIO ErrorLength
data LogMode
NoLog :: LogMode
SimpleLog :: LogMode
DefaultLog :: LogMode
ServerLog :: LogMode
VerboseLog :: LogMode
checkFile :: FilePath -> Maybe String -> IO ()
getChecksum :: FilePath -> IO String
logWarning :: String -> PoseidonIO ()
logInfo :: String -> PoseidonIO ()
logDebug :: String -> PoseidonIO ()
logError :: String -> PoseidonIO ()
type LogA = LogAction IO Message
noLog :: LogA
logWithEnv :: MonadIO m => LogA -> PoseidonIO () -> m ()
padRight :: Int -> String -> String
padLeft :: Int -> String -> String
determinePackageOutName :: Maybe String -> FilePath -> IO String
data () => PlinkPopNameMode
PlinkPopNameAsFamily :: PlinkPopNameMode
PlinkPopNameAsPhenotype :: PlinkPopNameMode
PlinkPopNameAsBoth :: PlinkPopNameMode
data TestMode
Testing :: TestMode
Production :: TestMode
data Env
Env :: LogA -> TestMode -> PlinkPopNameMode -> ErrorLength -> Env
[_envLogAction] :: Env -> LogA
[_envTestMode] :: Env -> TestMode
[_envInputPlinkMode] :: Env -> PlinkPopNameMode
[_envErrorLength] :: Env -> ErrorLength
uniquePO :: Ord a => [a] -> [a]
uniqueRO :: Ord a => [a] -> [a]
showParsecErr :: ParseError -> String

-- | A data type for error length settings
data ErrorLength
CharInf :: ErrorLength
CharCount :: Int -> ErrorLength
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Utils.TestMode
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Utils.LogMode
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Utils.ErrorLength
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Utils.PoseidonException
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Poseidon.Core.Utils.PoseidonException

module Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource

-- | A data type to represent a seqSourceFile
newtype SeqSourceRows
SeqSourceRows :: [SeqSourceRow] -> SeqSourceRows
[getSeqSourceRowList] :: SeqSourceRows -> [SeqSourceRow]

-- | A data type to represent a row in the seqSourceFile See
--   <a>https://github.com/poseidon-framework/poseidon2-schema/blob/master/seqSourceFile_columns.tsv</a>
--   for more details
data SeqSourceRow
SeqSourceRow :: Maybe (ListColumn PoseidonID) -> Maybe SSFUDG -> Maybe SSFLibraryBuilt -> Maybe SSFAccessionIDSample -> Maybe SSFAccessionIDStudy -> Maybe SSFAccessionIDRun -> Maybe SSFSampleAlias -> Maybe SSFSecondarySampleAccession -> Maybe SSFFirstPublicSimpleDate -> Maybe SSFLastUpdatedSimpleDate -> Maybe SSFInstrumentModel -> Maybe SSFLibraryLayout -> Maybe SSFLibrarySource -> Maybe SSFInstrumentPlatform -> Maybe SSFLibraryName -> Maybe SSFLibraryStrategy -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFFastqFTPURI) -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFFastqASPERAURI) -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFFastqBytes) -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFFastqMD5) -> Maybe SSFReadCount -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFSubmittedFTPURI) -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFSubmittedMD5) -> CsvNamedRecord -> SeqSourceRow
[sPoseidonID] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe (ListColumn PoseidonID)
[sUDG] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFUDG
[sLibraryBuilt] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFLibraryBuilt
[sSampleAccession] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFAccessionIDSample
[sStudyAccession] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFAccessionIDStudy
[sRunAccession] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFAccessionIDRun
[sSampleAlias] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFSampleAlias
[sSecondarySampleAccession] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFSecondarySampleAccession
[sFirstPublic] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFFirstPublicSimpleDate
[sLastUpdated] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFLastUpdatedSimpleDate
[sInstrumentModel] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFInstrumentModel
[sLibraryLayout] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFLibraryLayout
[sLibrarySource] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFLibrarySource
[sInstrumentPlatform] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFInstrumentPlatform
[sLibraryName] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFLibraryName
[sLibraryStrategy] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFLibraryStrategy
[sFastqFTP] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFFastqFTPURI)
[sFastqASPERA] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFFastqASPERAURI)
[sFastqBytes] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFFastqBytes)
[sFastqMD5] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFFastqMD5)
[sReadCount] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe SSFReadCount
[sSubmittedFTP] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFSubmittedFTPURI)
[sSubmittedMD5] :: SeqSourceRow -> Maybe (ListColumn SSFSubmittedMD5)
[sAdditionalColumns] :: SeqSourceRow -> CsvNamedRecord
seqSourceHeader :: [ByteString]
seqSourceHeaderString :: [String]
mainSSFColumns :: [ByteString]
seqSourceRefHashMap :: HashMap ByteString ()
parseSeqSourceRowFromNamedRecord :: PoseidonVersion -> [ByteString] -> NamedRecord -> Parser SeqSourceRow

-- | A function to write one seqSourceFile
writeSeqSourceFile :: FilePath -> SeqSourceRows -> IO ()

-- | A function to read one seqSourceFile
readSeqSourceFile :: PoseidonVersion -> [ByteString] -> FilePath -> PoseidonIO SeqSourceRows

-- | A function to read one row of a seqSourceFile
readSeqSourceFileRow :: PoseidonVersion -> [ByteString] -> FilePath -> (Int, ByteString) -> PoseidonIO (Either PoseidonException SeqSourceRow)
warnSeqSourceConsistency :: FilePath -> SeqSourceRows -> PoseidonIO ()
checkRunsUnique :: SeqSourceRows -> Bool
checkAtLeastOnePoseidonID :: SeqSourceRows -> Bool
checkSSFRowConsistency :: SeqSourceRow -> RowLog SeqSourceRow
checkFastqConsistency :: SeqSourceRow -> RowLog SeqSourceRow
checkSubmittedConsistency :: SeqSourceRow -> RowLog SeqSourceRow
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRow
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.HasDatatypeInfo Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRow
instance Data.Csv.Conversion.DefaultOrdered Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRow
instance Data.Csv.Conversion.ToNamedRecord Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRow
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRow
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRow
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRow
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRows
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRows
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRows
instance GHC.Base.Semigroup Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRows
instance GHC.Base.Monoid Poseidon.Core.SequencingSource.SeqSourceRows

module Poseidon.Core.Janno

-- | A data type to represent a sample/janno file row See
--   <a>https://github.com/poseidon-framework/poseidon2-schema/blob/master/janno_columns.tsv</a>
--   for more details
data JannoRow
JannoRow :: PoseidonID -> GeneticSex -> ListColumn GroupName -> Maybe JannoIndividualID -> Maybe JannoSpecies -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoAlternativeID) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoAlternativeIDContext) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoRelationTo) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoRelationDegree) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoRelationType) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCollectionID) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCustodianInstitution) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCulturalEra) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCulturalEraURL) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoArchaeologicalCulture) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoArchaeologicalCultureURL) -> Maybe JannoCountry -> Maybe JannoCountryISO -> Maybe JannoLocation -> Maybe JannoSite -> Maybe JannoLatitude -> Maybe JannoLongitude -> Maybe JannoDateType -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoDateC14Labnr) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoDateC14UncalBP) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoDateC14UncalBPErr) -> Maybe JannoDateBCADStart -> Maybe JannoDateBCADMedian -> Maybe JannoDateBCADStop -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoChromosomalAnomalies) -> Maybe JannoMTHaplogroup -> Maybe JannoYHaplogroup -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoSourceMaterial) -> Maybe JannoNrLibraries -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoLibraryName) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCaptureType) -> Maybe JannoUDG -> Maybe JannoLibraryBuilt -> Maybe JannoGenotypePloidy -> Maybe JannoDataPreparationPipelineURL -> Maybe JannoEndogenous -> Maybe JannoNrSNPs -> Maybe JannoCoverageOnTargets -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoDamage) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoContamination) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoContaminationErr) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoContaminationMeas) -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoGeneticSourceAccessionID) -> Maybe JannoPrimaryContact -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoPublication) -> Maybe JannoComment -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoKeyword) -> CsvNamedRecord -> JannoRow
[jPoseidonID] :: JannoRow -> PoseidonID
[jGeneticSex] :: JannoRow -> GeneticSex
[jGroupName] :: JannoRow -> ListColumn GroupName
[jIndividualID] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoIndividualID
[jSpecies] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoSpecies
[jAlternativeIDs] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoAlternativeID)
[jAlternativeIDsContext] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoAlternativeIDContext)
[jRelationTo] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoRelationTo)
[jRelationDegree] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoRelationDegree)
[jRelationType] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoRelationType)
[jCollectionID] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCollectionID)
[jCustodianInstitution] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCustodianInstitution)
[jCulturalEra] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCulturalEra)
[jCulturalEraURL] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCulturalEraURL)
[jArchaeologicalCulture] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoArchaeologicalCulture)
[jArchaeologicalCultureURL] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoArchaeologicalCultureURL)
[jCountry] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoCountry
[jCountryISO] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoCountryISO
[jLocation] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoLocation
[jSite] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoSite
[jLatitude] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoLatitude
[jLongitude] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoLongitude
[jDateType] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoDateType
[jDateC14Labnr] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoDateC14Labnr)
[jDateC14UncalBP] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoDateC14UncalBP)
[jDateC14UncalBPErr] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoDateC14UncalBPErr)
[jDateBCADStart] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoDateBCADStart
[jDateBCADMedian] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoDateBCADMedian
[jDateBCADStop] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoDateBCADStop
[jChromosomalAnomalies] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoChromosomalAnomalies)
[jMTHaplogroup] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoMTHaplogroup
[jYHaplogroup] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoYHaplogroup
[jSourceMaterial] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoSourceMaterial)
[jNrLibraries] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoNrLibraries
[jLibraryNames] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoLibraryName)
[jCaptureType] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoCaptureType)
[jUDG] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoUDG
[jLibraryBuilt] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoLibraryBuilt
[jGenotypePloidy] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoGenotypePloidy
[jDataPreparationPipelineURL] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoDataPreparationPipelineURL
[jEndogenous] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoEndogenous
[jNrSNPs] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoNrSNPs
[jCoverageOnTargets] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoCoverageOnTargets
[jDamage] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoDamage)
[jContamination] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoContamination)
[jContaminationErr] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoContaminationErr)
[jContaminationMeas] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoContaminationMeas)
[jGeneticSourceAccessionIDs] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoGeneticSourceAccessionID)
[jPrimaryContact] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoPrimaryContact
[jPublication] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoPublication)
[jComments] :: JannoRow -> Maybe JannoComment
[jKeywords] :: JannoRow -> Maybe (ListColumn JannoKeyword)
[jAdditionalColumns] :: JannoRow -> CsvNamedRecord
writeJannoFile :: FilePath -> JannoRows -> IO ()
writeJannoFileWithoutEmptyCols :: FilePath -> JannoRows -> IO ()

-- | A function to load one janno file
readJannoFile :: PoseidonVersion -> [ByteString] -> FilePath -> PoseidonIO JannoRows

-- | A function to create empty janno rows for a set of individuals
createMinimalJanno :: [EigenstratIndEntry] -> JannoRows

-- | A function to create an empty janno row for an individual
createMinimalSample :: EigenstratIndEntry -> JannoRow
jannoHeaderString :: [String]
mainJannoColumns :: [ByteString]

-- | A data type to represent a janno file
newtype JannoRows
JannoRows :: [JannoRow] -> JannoRows
[getJannoRows] :: JannoRows -> [JannoRow]

-- | a convenience function to construct Eigenstrat Ind entries out of
--   jannoRows
jannoRows2EigenstratIndEntries :: JannoRows -> [EigenstratIndEntry]
makeHeaderWithAdditionalColumns :: [JannoRow] -> Header
parseJannoRowFromNamedRecord :: PoseidonVersion -> [ByteString] -> NamedRecord -> Parser JannoRow
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRow
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.HasDatatypeInfo Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRow
instance Data.Csv.Conversion.DefaultOrdered Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRow
instance Data.Csv.Conversion.ToNamedRecord Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRow
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRow
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRow
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRow
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRows
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRows
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRows
instance GHC.Base.Semigroup Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRows
instance GHC.Base.Monoid Poseidon.Core.Janno.JannoRows

module Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData
data GenoDataSource
PacBaseDir :: FilePath -> GenoDataSource
[getPacBaseDir] :: GenoDataSource -> FilePath
GenoDirect :: GenotypeDataSpec -> GenoDataSource
[getGenoDirect] :: GenoDataSource -> GenotypeDataSpec
data GenotypeDataSpec
GenotypeDataSpec :: GenotypeFileSpec -> Maybe SNPSetSpec -> Maybe String -> Maybe String -> GenotypeDataSpec
[genotypeFileSpec] :: GenotypeDataSpec -> GenotypeFileSpec
[genotypeSnpSet] :: GenotypeDataSpec -> Maybe SNPSetSpec
[genotypeRefAssemblyName] :: GenotypeDataSpec -> Maybe String
[genotypeRefAssemblyURL] :: GenotypeDataSpec -> Maybe String
data GenotypeFileSpec
GenotypeEigenstrat :: FilePath -> Maybe String -> FilePath -> Maybe String -> FilePath -> Maybe String -> GenotypeFileSpec
[_esGenoFile] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> FilePath
[_esGenoFileChkSum] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> Maybe String
[_esSnpFile] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> FilePath
[_esSnpFileChkSum] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> Maybe String
[_esIndFile] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> FilePath
[_esIndFileChkSum] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> Maybe String
GenotypePlink :: FilePath -> Maybe String -> FilePath -> Maybe String -> FilePath -> Maybe String -> GenotypeFileSpec
[_plGenoFile] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> FilePath
[_plGenoFileChkSum] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> Maybe String
[_plSnpFile] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> FilePath
[_plSnpFileChkSum] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> Maybe String
[_plIndFile] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> FilePath
[_plIndFileChkSum] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> Maybe String
GenotypeVCF :: FilePath -> Maybe String -> GenotypeFileSpec
[_vcfGenoFile] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> FilePath
[_vcfGenoFileChkSum] :: GenotypeFileSpec -> Maybe String
data GenotypeOutFormatSpec
GenotypeOutFormatPlink :: GenotypeOutFormatSpec
GenotypeOutFormatEigenstrat :: GenotypeOutFormatSpec
GenotypeOutFormatVCF :: GenotypeOutFormatSpec
data SNPSetSpec
SNPSet1240K :: SNPSetSpec
SNPSetHumanOrigins :: SNPSetSpec
SNPSetOther :: SNPSetSpec
snpSetMergeList :: [SNPSetSpec] -> Bool -> SNPSetSpec
snpSetMerge :: SNPSetSpec -> SNPSetSpec -> Bool -> SNPSetSpec

-- | removes directories of all filenames and returns a tuple of the
--   basename and a modified GenotypeDataSpec with pure filenames In case
--   basedirectories do not match, this function will throw an exception
reduceGenotypeFilepaths :: MonadThrow m => GenotypeDataSpec -> m (FilePath, GenotypeDataSpec)

-- | A function to return a list of all individuals in the genotype files
--   of a package.
loadIndividuals :: FilePath -> GenotypeDataSpec -> PoseidonIO [EigenstratIndEntry]
findGroupNamesInVCFheader :: [ByteString] -> Maybe [ByteString]
findGeneticSexInVCFheader :: [ByteString] -> Maybe (Either String [Sex])

-- | A function to read the genotype data of a package
loadGenotypeData :: MonadSafe m => FilePath -> GenotypeDataSpec -> m (Producer (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) m ())
vcf2eigenstratPipe :: MonadThrow m => Pipe VCFentry (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) m r
joinEntries :: MonadIO m => LogA -> [Int] -> [String] -> [Maybe (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine)] -> m (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine)
getConsensusSnpEntry :: MonadIO m => LogA -> [EigenstratSnpEntry] -> m EigenstratSnpEntry
recodeAlleles :: EigenstratSnpEntry -> EigenstratSnpEntry -> GenoLine -> Either String GenoLine
printSNPCopyProgress :: MonadIO m => LogA -> UTCTime -> Pipe a a m ()
selectIndices :: [Int] -> (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) -> (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine)
writeVCF :: MonadSafe m => LogA -> [JannoRow] -> FilePath -> Consumer (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) m ()
createVCFentry :: MonadIO m => LogA -> [JannoRow] -> (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) -> m VCFentry
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenotypeFileSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenotypeFileSpec
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.SNPSetSpec
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenotypeDataSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenotypeDataSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenoDataSource
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenotypeDataSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenotypeDataSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.SNPSetSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.SNPSetSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.SNPSetSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenotypeOutFormatSpec
instance GHC.Read.Read Poseidon.Core.GenotypeData.GenotypeOutFormatSpec

module Poseidon.Core.Contributor

-- | A data type to represent a contributor
data ContributorSpec
ContributorSpec :: String -> String -> Maybe ORCID -> ContributorSpec

-- | the name of a contributor
[contributorName] :: ContributorSpec -> String

-- | the email address of a contributor
[contributorEmail] :: ContributorSpec -> String

-- | the ORCID of a contributor
[contributorORCID] :: ContributorSpec -> Maybe ORCID
contributorSpecParser :: Parser [ContributorSpec]

-- | A data type to represent an ORCID see
--   <a>https://support.orcid.org/hc/en-us/articles/360006897674-Structure-of-the-ORCID-Identifier</a>
data ORCID
ORCID :: [Char] -> Char -> ORCID
[_orcidNums] :: ORCID -> [Char]
[_orcidChecksum] :: ORCID -> Char
renderORCID :: ORCID -> String
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ORCID
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ORCID
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ORCID
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ContributorSpec
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ContributorSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ContributorSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ContributorSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ContributorSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ORCID
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.Contributor.ORCID

module Poseidon.Core.BibFile
dummyBibEntry :: BibEntry
readBibTeXFile :: FilePath -> IO BibTeX
writeBibTeXFile :: FilePath -> BibTeX -> IO ()
type BibTeX = [BibEntry]
data BibEntry
BibEntry :: String -> String -> [(String, String)] -> BibEntry
[bibEntryType] :: BibEntry -> String
[bibEntryId] :: BibEntry -> String
[bibEntryFields] :: BibEntry -> [(String, String)]
renderBibEntry :: BibEntry -> String
parseAuthors :: MonadThrow m => String -> m [(String, String)]
authorAbbrvString :: [(String, String)] -> String
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.BibFile.BibEntry
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.BibFile.BibEntry
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.BibFile.BibEntry

module Poseidon.Analysis.Generator.SampleGeno
samplePerChunk :: MonadIO m => LogA -> [IndConcrete] -> Producer (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) m r -> Producer (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) m r
sampleInIndForChunk :: MonadIO m => LogA -> IndConcrete -> m Int
samplePerSNP :: MonadIO m => Bool -> [IndConcrete] -> (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) -> m (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine)
sampleSNPForOneOutInd :: MonadIO m => Bool -> IndConcrete -> GenoLine -> m GenoEntry
getGenotypeFrequency :: Bool -> [Int] -> GenoLine -> [(GenoEntry, Rational)]
calcFractions :: [GenoEntry] -> [(GenoEntry, Rational)]
compareGenoEntry :: GenoEntry -> GenoEntry -> Ordering
sampleWeightedList :: RandomGen g => g -> [(a, Rational)] -> a
sampleGenoForMultiplePOIs :: [([Int], [Rational])] -> (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) -> SafeT IO (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine)
sampleGenoForOnePOI :: [Int] -> [Rational] -> GenoLine -> SafeT IO GenoEntry
getGenoIndices :: Eq a => [a] -> [(a, [Int])]
sumWeights :: Num b => [(a, [Int])] -> [b] -> [(a, b)]

module Poseidon.Core.Version
data VersionComponent
Major :: VersionComponent
Minor :: VersionComponent
Patch :: VersionComponent
updateThreeComponentVersion :: VersionComponent -> Version -> Version
parseVersion :: Parser Version
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Version.VersionComponent

module Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes

-- | a minimal datatype representing an individual in a collection of
--   packages
data IndividualInfo
IndividualInfo :: String -> [String] -> PacNameAndVersion -> IndividualInfo

-- | the name of the individual, corresponding to jPoseidonID in Janno
[indInfoName] :: IndividualInfo -> String

-- | the groups associated with the individual, corresponding to jGroupName
--   in Janno
[indInfoGroups] :: IndividualInfo -> [String]

-- | the package the individual is in.
[indInfoPac] :: IndividualInfo -> PacNameAndVersion

-- | a tuple of a collection of IndividualInfos and a list of bools
--   indicating whether the given sample is in the latest version of
--   packages
type IndividualInfoCollection = ([IndividualInfo], [Bool])

-- | universal rendering of package names and version
renderNameWithVersion :: HasNameAndVersion a => a -> String

-- | A class to represent a package-identifying property
class Eq a => HasNameAndVersion a
getPacName :: HasNameAndVersion a => a -> String
getPacVersion :: HasNameAndVersion a => a -> Maybe Version

-- | A datatype to represent a requested package, group or individual
data PoseidonEntity

-- | all individuals in a package. A version can be specified, if not
--   implicitly request the latest
Pac :: PacNameAndVersion -> PoseidonEntity

-- | all individuals with a given group, in all of the latest packages
Group :: String -> PoseidonEntity

-- | all individuals with the given name, in all of the latest packages
Ind :: String -> PoseidonEntity

-- | the individual specified by its name, group and package. If not
--   versioned, then take the latest version.
SpecificInd :: String -> String -> PacNameAndVersion -> PoseidonEntity

-- | a signed entity specification, denoting inclusion or exclusion of an
--   entity
data SignedEntity
Include :: PoseidonEntity -> SignedEntity
Exclude :: PoseidonEntity -> SignedEntity

-- | a convenience function
hasVersion :: HasNameAndVersion a => a -> Bool
type EntitiesList = [PoseidonEntity]
type SignedEntitiesList = [SignedEntity]

-- | The minimal instance of HasNameAndVersion
data PacNameAndVersion
PacNameAndVersion :: String -> Maybe Version -> PacNameAndVersion
[panavName] :: PacNameAndVersion -> String
[panavVersion] :: PacNameAndVersion -> Maybe Version

-- | a function to normalise any instance of HasNameAndVersion to the
--   minimal concrete type PacNameAndVersion
makePacNameAndVersion :: HasNameAndVersion a => a -> PacNameAndVersion

-- | a function to check whether a given package is the latest within a
--   collection
isLatestInCollection :: (MonadThrow m, HasNameAndVersion a) => [a] -> a -> m Bool

-- | A class to generalise signed and unsigned Entity Lists. Both have the
--   feature that they can be used to filter individuals.
class EntitySpec a
resolveUniqueEntityIndices :: EntitySpec a => Bool -> [a] -> IndividualInfoCollection -> PoseidonIO [Int]

-- | this function checks whether a given individual info is selected by a
--   given list of entities.
indInfoConformsToEntitySpecs :: EntitySpec a => IndividualInfo -> Bool -> [a] -> Bool
underlyingEntity :: EntitySpec a => a -> PoseidonEntity
entitySpecParser :: EntitySpec a => Parser a
readEntitiesFromFile :: EntitySpec a => FilePath -> IO [a]
readEntitiesFromString :: EntitySpec a => String -> Either PoseidonException [a]

-- | this returns a list of entities which could not be found
determineNonExistentEntities :: EntitySpec a => [a] -> IndividualInfoCollection -> EntitiesList

-- | determine all packages with versions that contain individuals covered
--   by the given entities
determineRelevantPackages :: (MonadThrow m, EntitySpec a) => [a] -> IndividualInfoCollection -> m [PacNameAndVersion]
entitiesListP :: EntitySpec a => Parser [a]
data EntityInput a
EntitiesDirect :: [a] -> EntityInput a
EntitiesFromFile :: FilePath -> EntityInput a
readEntityInputs :: (MonadIO m, EntitySpec a, Eq a) => [EntityInput a] -> m [a]
checkIfAllEntitiesExist :: EntitySpec a => [a] -> IndividualInfoCollection -> PoseidonIO ()
resolveEntityIndices :: EntitySpec a => Bool -> [a] -> IndividualInfoCollection -> [Int]

-- | takes a list of selected individuals, checks for duplicates and
--   reports a list of individuals with suggested Entity specifications
reportDuplicateIndividuals :: [IndividualInfo] -> [(IndividualInfo, [PoseidonEntity])]
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PacNameAndVersion
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PacNameAndVersion
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PoseidonEntity
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PoseidonEntity
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.SignedEntity
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.SignedEntity
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.IndividualInfo
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.IndividualInfo
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.IndividualInfo
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.IndividualInfo
instance GHC.Show.Show a => GHC.Show.Show (Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.EntityInput a)
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.EntitySpec Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.SignedEntity
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.EntitySpec Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PoseidonEntity
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.HasNameAndVersion Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.IndividualInfo
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.SignedEntity
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.SignedEntity
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.SignedEntity
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PoseidonEntity
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PoseidonEntity
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PoseidonEntity
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.HasNameAndVersion Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PacNameAndVersion
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.PacNameAndVersion

module Poseidon.Core.ServerClient
data ServerApiReturnType
ServerApiReturnType :: [String] -> Maybe ApiReturnData -> ServerApiReturnType
[_apiMessages] :: ServerApiReturnType -> [String]
[_apiResponse] :: ServerApiReturnType -> Maybe ApiReturnData
data ApiReturnData
ApiReturnPackageInfo :: [PackageInfo] -> ApiReturnData
ApiReturnGroupInfo :: [GroupInfo] -> ApiReturnData
ApiReturnExtIndividualInfo :: [ExtendedIndividualInfo] -> ApiReturnData
ApiReturnBibInfo :: [BibliographyInfo] -> ApiReturnData
processApiResponse :: String -> Bool -> PoseidonIO ApiReturnData
data ArchiveEndpoint
ArchiveEndpoint :: String -> Maybe String -> ArchiveEndpoint
[_aeServerURL] :: ArchiveEndpoint -> String
[_aeArchiveName] :: ArchiveEndpoint -> Maybe String
data PackageInfo
PackageInfo :: PacNameAndVersion -> Bool -> Version -> Maybe String -> Maybe Day -> Int -> [ContributorSpec] -> [FilePath] -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> PackageInfo
[pPac] :: PackageInfo -> PacNameAndVersion
[pIsLatest] :: PackageInfo -> Bool
[pPosVersion] :: PackageInfo -> Version
[pDescription] :: PackageInfo -> Maybe String
[pLastModified] :: PackageInfo -> Maybe Day
[pNrIndividuals] :: PackageInfo -> Int
[pContributors] :: PackageInfo -> [ContributorSpec]
[pGenotypeFiles] :: PackageInfo -> [FilePath]
[pBaseDir] :: PackageInfo -> Maybe FilePath
[pJannoFile] :: PackageInfo -> Maybe FilePath
[pSeqSourceFile] :: PackageInfo -> Maybe FilePath
[pBibFile] :: PackageInfo -> Maybe FilePath
[pReadmeFile] :: PackageInfo -> Maybe FilePath
[pChangelogFile] :: PackageInfo -> Maybe FilePath
data GroupInfo
GroupInfo :: String -> PacNameAndVersion -> Bool -> Int -> GroupInfo
[gName] :: GroupInfo -> String
[gPackage] :: GroupInfo -> PacNameAndVersion
[gIsLatest] :: GroupInfo -> Bool
[gNrIndividuals] :: GroupInfo -> Int
data ExtendedIndividualInfo
ExtendedIndividualInfo :: String -> [String] -> PacNameAndVersion -> Bool -> [(String, Maybe String)] -> ExtendedIndividualInfo
[extIndInfoName] :: ExtendedIndividualInfo -> String
[extIndInfoGroups] :: ExtendedIndividualInfo -> [String]
[extIndInfoPac] :: ExtendedIndividualInfo -> PacNameAndVersion
[extIndInfoIsLatest] :: ExtendedIndividualInfo -> Bool
[extIndInfoAddCols] :: ExtendedIndividualInfo -> [(String, Maybe String)]
extIndInfo2IndInfoCollection :: [ExtendedIndividualInfo] -> IndividualInfoCollection
qDefault :: Maybe String -> String
qArchive :: Maybe String -> String
qPacVersion :: Maybe Version -> String
(+&+) :: String -> String -> String
data BibliographyInfo
BibliographyInfo :: Int -> String -> Maybe String -> Maybe String -> Maybe String -> Maybe String -> Maybe String -> [(String, Maybe String)] -> BibliographyInfo
[bibInfoNrSamples] :: BibliographyInfo -> Int
[bibInfoKey] :: BibliographyInfo -> String
[bibInfoTitle] :: BibliographyInfo -> Maybe String
[bibInfoAuthor] :: BibliographyInfo -> Maybe String
[bibInfoYear] :: BibliographyInfo -> Maybe String
[bibInfoJournal] :: BibliographyInfo -> Maybe String
[bibInfoDoi] :: BibliographyInfo -> Maybe String
[bibInfoAddCols] :: BibliographyInfo -> [(String, Maybe String)]
data AddColSpec
AddColList :: [String] -> AddColSpec
AddColAll :: AddColSpec
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.PackageInfo
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.PackageInfo
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.GroupInfo
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.ExtendedIndividualInfo
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.BibliographyInfo
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.ServerApiReturnType
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.ServerApiReturnType
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.ApiReturnData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.ApiReturnData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.BibliographyInfo
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.BibliographyInfo
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.HasNameAndVersion Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.ExtendedIndividualInfo
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.ExtendedIndividualInfo
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.ExtendedIndividualInfo
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.GroupInfo
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.GroupInfo
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.HasNameAndVersion Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.GroupInfo
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.HasNameAndVersion Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.PackageInfo
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.PackageInfo
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerClient.PackageInfo

module Poseidon.Core.Package

-- | Internal structure for YAML loading only
data PoseidonYamlStruct
PoseidonYamlStruct :: PoseidonVersion -> String -> Maybe String -> [ContributorSpec] -> Maybe Version -> Maybe Day -> Maybe LicenseSpec -> GenotypeDataSpec -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe String -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe String -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe String -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> PoseidonYamlStruct
[_posYamlPoseidonVersion] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> PoseidonVersion
[_posYamlTitle] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> String
[_posYamlDescription] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe String
[_posYamlContributor] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> [ContributorSpec]
[_posYamlPackageVersion] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe Version
[_posYamlLastModified] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe Day
[_posYamlLicense] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe LicenseSpec
[_posYamlGenotypeData] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> GenotypeDataSpec
[_posYamlJannoFile] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe FilePath
[_posYamlJannoFileChkSum] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe String
[_posYamlSeqSourceFile] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe FilePath
[_posYamlSeqSourceFileChkSum] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe String
[_posYamlBibFile] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe FilePath
[_posYamlBibFileChkSum] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe String
[_posYamlReadmeFile] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe FilePath
[_posYamlChangelogFile] :: PoseidonYamlStruct -> Maybe FilePath

-- | A data type to represent a Poseidon Package
data PoseidonPackage
PoseidonPackage :: FilePath -> PoseidonVersion -> PacNameAndVersion -> Maybe String -> [ContributorSpec] -> Maybe Day -> Maybe LicenseSpec -> GenotypeDataSpec -> Maybe FilePath -> JannoRows -> Maybe String -> Maybe FilePath -> SeqSourceRows -> Maybe String -> Maybe FilePath -> BibTeX -> Maybe String -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> PoseidonPackage

-- | the base directory of the YAML file
[posPacBaseDir] :: PoseidonPackage -> FilePath

-- | the version of the package
[posPacPoseidonVersion] :: PoseidonPackage -> PoseidonVersion

-- | the title and version of the package
[posPacNameAndVersion] :: PoseidonPackage -> PacNameAndVersion

-- | the optional description string of the package
[posPacDescription] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe String

-- | the contributor(s) of the package
[posPacContributor] :: PoseidonPackage -> [ContributorSpec]

-- | the optional date of last update
[posPacLastModified] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe Day
[posPacLicense] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe LicenseSpec

-- | the paths to the genotype files
[posPacGenotypeData] :: PoseidonPackage -> GenotypeDataSpec

-- | the path to the janno file
[posPacJannoFile] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe FilePath

-- | the loaded janno file
[posPacJanno] :: PoseidonPackage -> JannoRows

-- | the optional jannofile checksum
[posPacJannoFileChkSum] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe String

-- | the path to the seqSource file
[posPacSeqSourceFile] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe FilePath

-- | the loaded seqSource file
[posPacSeqSource] :: PoseidonPackage -> SeqSourceRows

-- | the optional seqSource file checksum
[posPacSeqSourceFileChkSum] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe String

-- | the path to the BibTeX file
[posPacBibFile] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe FilePath

-- | the loaded bibliography file
[posPacBib] :: PoseidonPackage -> BibTeX

-- | the optional bibfile chksum
[posPacBibFileChkSum] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe String

-- | the path to the README file
[posPacReadmeFile] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe FilePath

-- | the path to the CHANGELOG file
[posPacChangelogFile] :: PoseidonPackage -> Maybe FilePath

-- | A Poseidon Exception data type with several concrete constructors
data PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent YAML parsing errors
PoseidonYamlParseException :: FilePath -> ParseException -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent a logical error in a package
PoseidonPackageException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent an issue with a package version
PoseidonPackageVersionException :: FilePath -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate a missing poseidonVersion field
PoseidonPackageMissingVersionException :: FilePath -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent an error when searching for individuals or
--   populations
PoseidonIndSearchException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors in the genotype data
PoseidonGenotypeException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors in the genotype data forwarded from
--   the sequence-formats library
PoseidonGenotypeExceptionForward :: ErrorLength -> SomeException -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors in the remote data loading forwarded
--   from simpleHttp
PoseidonHttpExceptionForward :: HttpException -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors when trying to parse the janno or
--   seqSource file
PoseidonFileRowException :: FilePath -> String -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent consistency errors in janno or seqSource
--   files
PoseidonFileConsistencyException :: FilePath -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent inconsistencies across multiple files in a
--   package
PoseidonCrossFileConsistencyException :: String -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent logical issues in a poseidon package
--   Collection
PoseidonCollectionException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent missing files
PoseidonFileExistenceException :: FilePath -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent failed checksum tests
PoseidonFileChecksumException :: FilePath -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception type to represent FStat specification errors
PoseidonFStatsFormatException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to represent errors when trying to parse the .bib file
PoseidonBibTeXException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate failed entity parsing
PoseidonPoseidonEntityParsingException :: ParseError -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate issues in the forge selection
PoseidonForgeEntitiesException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to throw if there is nothing to be forged
PoseidonEmptyForgeException :: PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate an issue in newPackageTemplate
PoseidonNewPackageConstructionException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to indicate failed remote info JSON parsing
PoseidonRemoteJSONParsingException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | A catch-all for any other type of exception
PoseidonGenericException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to throw if the output package lacks a name
PoseidonEmptyOutPacNameException :: PoseidonException

-- | An exception to throw if genotype data files don't share a common base
--   directory
PoseidonUnequalBaseDirException :: FilePath -> FilePath -> FilePath -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception to mark server communication errors
PoseidonServerCommunicationException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception for unzipping issues in fetch
PoseidonUnzipException :: SomeException -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception for issues in chronicle
PoseidonChronicleException :: String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception for issues with git
PoseidonGitException :: FilePath -> String -> PoseidonException

-- | An exception for issues with --preservePyml
PoseidonCantPreserveException :: PoseidonException
data PackageReadOptions
PackageReadOptions :: Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> [ByteString] -> [ByteString] -> PackageReadOptions

-- | whether to ignore all checksums
[_readOptIgnoreChecksums] :: PackageReadOptions -> Bool

-- | whether to ignore missing genotype files, useful for developer use
--   cases
[_readOptIgnoreGeno] :: PackageReadOptions -> Bool

-- | whether to check the SNPs of the genotypes
[_readOptGenoCheck] :: PackageReadOptions -> Bool

-- | whether to check all SNPs or only the first 100
[_readOptFullGeno] :: PackageReadOptions -> Bool

-- | whether to ignore the Poseidon version of an input package.
[_readOptIgnorePosVersion] :: PackageReadOptions -> Bool

-- | whether to keep multiple versions of the same package (True) or just
--   the latest one (False)
[_readOptOnlyLatest] :: PackageReadOptions -> Bool

-- | .janno columns that should be treated as mandatory
[_readOptMandatoryJannoCols] :: PackageReadOptions -> [ByteString]

-- | .ssf columns that should be treated as mandatory
[_readOptMandatorySSFCols] :: PackageReadOptions -> [ByteString]
data LicenseSpec
LicenseSpec :: String -> Maybe String -> Maybe FilePath -> LicenseSpec
[licenseName] :: LicenseSpec -> String
[licenseURL] :: LicenseSpec -> Maybe String
[licenseFile] :: LicenseSpec -> Maybe FilePath
findAllPoseidonYmlFiles :: FilePath -> IO [FilePath]
checkJannoIndConsistency :: String -> JannoRows -> [EigenstratIndEntry] -> Bool -> IO ()
readPoseidonPackageCollection :: PackageReadOptions -> [FilePath] -> PoseidonIO [PoseidonPackage]

-- | a utility function to load all poseidon packages found recursively in
--   multiple base directories. This also takes care of smart filtering and
--   duplication checks. Exceptions lead to skipping packages and
--   outputting warnings. A flag is returned for whether packages were
--   skipped (needed for validate)
readPoseidonPackageCollectionWithSkipIndicator :: PackageReadOptions -> [FilePath] -> PoseidonIO ([PoseidonPackage], Bool)

-- | A function to read genotype data jointly from multiple packages
getJointGenotypeData :: MonadSafe m => LogA -> Bool -> [PoseidonPackage] -> Maybe FilePath -> m (Producer (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) m ())
getJointJanno :: [PoseidonPackage] -> JannoRows
getJointIndividualInfo :: MonadThrow m => [PoseidonPackage] -> m IndividualInfoCollection
getExtendedIndividualInfo :: MonadThrow m => [PoseidonPackage] -> AddColSpec -> m [ExtendedIndividualInfo]

-- | A function to create a minimal POSEIDON package
newMinimalPackageTemplate :: MonadThrow m => FilePath -> String -> GenotypeDataSpec -> m PoseidonPackage

-- | A function to create a more complete POSEIDON package This will take
--   only the filenames of the provided files, so it assumes that the files
--   will be copied into the directory into which the YAML file will be
--   written
newPackageTemplate :: FilePath -> String -> GenotypeDataSpec -> Maybe (Either [EigenstratIndEntry] JannoRows) -> SeqSourceRows -> BibTeX -> PoseidonIO PoseidonPackage
renderMismatch :: [String] -> [String] -> String
zipWithPadding :: a -> b -> [a] -> [b] -> [(a, b)]
writePoseidonPackage :: PoseidonPackage -> IO ()
defaultPackageReadOptions :: PackageReadOptions

-- | A function to read in a poseidon package from a YAML file. Note that
--   this function calls the addFullPaths function to make paths absolute.
readPoseidonPackage :: PackageReadOptions -> FilePath -> PoseidonIO PoseidonPackage
makePseudoPackageFromGenotypeData :: GenotypeDataSpec -> PoseidonIO PoseidonPackage
getJannoRowsFromPac :: PoseidonPackage -> [JannoRow]
packagesToPackageInfos :: MonadThrow m => Bool -> [PoseidonPackage] -> m [PackageInfo]
getAllGroupInfo :: MonadThrow m => [PoseidonPackage] -> m [GroupInfo]
validateGeno :: PoseidonPackage -> Bool -> PoseidonIO ()

-- | Filter packages such that only packages with individuals covered by
--   the given EntitySpec are returned
filterToRelevantPackages :: MonadThrow m => EntitySpec a => [a] -> [PoseidonPackage] -> m [PoseidonPackage]
getBibliographyInfo :: MonadThrow m => [PoseidonPackage] -> AddColSpec -> m [BibliographyInfo]
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.Package.LicenseSpec
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Package.LicenseSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Package.LicenseSpec
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonYamlStruct
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonYamlStruct
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonYamlStruct
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonPackage
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonPackage
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonPackage
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonPackage
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.HasNameAndVersion Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonPackage
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonYamlStruct
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonYamlStruct
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.HasNameAndVersion Poseidon.Core.Package.PoseidonYamlStruct
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.Package.LicenseSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.Package.LicenseSpec

module Poseidon.Core.ServerHTML
mainPage :: [(String, Maybe String, Maybe String, [PoseidonPackage])] -> ActionM ()
archivePage :: String -> Maybe String -> Bool -> [String] -> Int -> [MapMarker] -> [PoseidonPackage] -> ActionM ()
packageVersionPage :: String -> String -> Maybe Version -> Bool -> [MapMarker] -> String -> PoseidonPackage -> [PoseidonPackage] -> [JannoRow] -> ActionM ()
samplePage :: Maybe MapMarker -> JannoRow -> ActionM ()
data MapMarker
MapMarker :: Double -> Double -> String -> String -> Maybe String -> String -> Maybe String -> Maybe String -> MapMarker
[mmLat] :: MapMarker -> Double
[mmLon] :: MapMarker -> Double
[mmPoseidonID] :: MapMarker -> String
[mmPackageName] :: MapMarker -> String
[mmPackageVersion] :: MapMarker -> Maybe String
[mmArchiveName] :: MapMarker -> String
[mmLocation] :: MapMarker -> Maybe String
[mmAge] :: MapMarker -> Maybe String
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.ServerHTML.MapMarker
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Poseidon.Core.ServerHTML.MapMarker
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.ServerHTML.MapMarker

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Survey

-- | A datatype representing command line options for the survey command
data SurveyOptions
SurveyOptions :: [FilePath] -> Bool -> Bool -> SurveyOptions
[_surveyBaseDirs] :: SurveyOptions -> [FilePath]
[_surveyRawOutput] :: SurveyOptions -> Bool
[_surveyOnlyLatest] :: SurveyOptions -> Bool

-- | The main function running the janno command
runSurvey :: SurveyOptions -> PoseidonIO ()
renderPackageWithCompleteness :: Bool -> JannoRows -> SeqSourceRows -> BibTeX -> String
renderJannoCompleteness :: JannoRows -> String
class PresenceCountable a
countPresence :: PresenceCountable a => a -> Int
instance Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Survey.PresenceCountable Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.PoseidonID
instance Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Survey.PresenceCountable (GHC.Maybe.Maybe a)
instance Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Survey.PresenceCountable GHC.Base.String
instance Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Survey.PresenceCountable Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesJanno.GeneticSex
instance Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Survey.PresenceCountable (Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.ListColumn a)
instance Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Survey.PresenceCountable Poseidon.Core.ColumnTypesUtils.CsvNamedRecord

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Summarise

-- | A datatype representing command line options for the summarise command
data SummariseOptions
SummariseOptions :: [FilePath] -> Bool -> SummariseOptions
[_summariseBaseDirs] :: SummariseOptions -> [FilePath]
[_summariseRawOutput] :: SummariseOptions -> Bool
pacReadOpts :: PackageReadOptions

-- | The main function running the janno command
runSummarise :: SummariseOptions -> PoseidonIO ()

-- | A function to print meaningful summary information for a list of
--   poseidon samples
summariseJannoRows :: JannoRows -> Bool -> IO ()

-- | A helper function to concat the first N elements of a string list in a
--   nice way
paste :: [String] -> String
uniqueNumber :: Ord a => [a] -> String

-- | A helper function to determine the frequency of objects in a list
--   (similar to the table function in R)
frequency :: Ord a => [a] -> [(a, Int)]
sortTupelsBySndDesc :: (Ord a, Ord b) => (a, b) -> (a, b) -> Ordering

-- | A helper function to print the output of frequency nicely
printFrequency :: Show a => String -> [(a, Int)] -> String

-- | A helper function to print the output of frequency over Maybe values
--   nicely
printFrequencyMaybe :: Show a => String -> [(Maybe a, Int)] -> String

-- | A helper function to unwrap a maybe
maybeShow :: Show a => Maybe a -> String

-- | As printFrequency, but without additional quoting of strings
printFrequencyString :: String -> [(String, Int)] -> String

-- | As printFrequencyMaybe, but without additional quoting of strings
printFrequencyMaybeString :: String -> [(Maybe String, Int)] -> String

-- | As maybeShow, but without additional quoting of strings
maybeShowString :: Maybe String -> String

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Jannocoalesce
data JannoSourceSpec
JannoSourceSingle :: VersionedFile -> JannoSourceSpec
JannoSourceBaseDirs :: [FilePath] -> JannoSourceSpec
data CoalesceJannoColumnSpec
AllJannoColumns :: CoalesceJannoColumnSpec
IncludeJannoColumns :: [ByteString] -> CoalesceJannoColumnSpec
ExcludeJannoColumns :: [ByteString] -> CoalesceJannoColumnSpec
data JannoCoalesceOptions
JannoCoalesceOptions :: JannoSourceSpec -> VersionedFile -> FilePath -> CoalesceJannoColumnSpec -> Bool -> String -> String -> Maybe String -> JannoCoalesceOptions
[_jannocoalesceSource] :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> JannoSourceSpec
[_jannocoalesceTarget] :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> VersionedFile
[_jannocoalesceOutFile] :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> FilePath
[_jannocoalesceJannoColumns] :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> CoalesceJannoColumnSpec
[_jannocoalesceOverwriteColumns] :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> Bool
[_jannocoalesceSourceKey] :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> String
[_jannocoalesceTargetKey] :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> String
[_jannocoalesceIdStrip] :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> Maybe String
runJannocoalesce :: JannoCoalesceOptions -> PoseidonIO ()
type CounterMismatches = IORef Int
type CounterCopied = IORef Int
makeNewJannoRows :: [JannoRow] -> [JannoRow] -> CoalesceJannoColumnSpec -> Bool -> String -> String -> Maybe String -> PoseidonIO [JannoRow]
getKeyFromJanno :: MonadThrow m => JannoRow -> String -> m String
matchWithOptionalStrip :: Maybe String -> String -> String -> Bool
mergeRow :: CounterCopied -> JannoRow -> JannoRow -> CoalesceJannoColumnSpec -> Bool -> String -> String -> PoseidonIO JannoRow

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Init
data InitOptions
InitOptions :: GenotypeDataSpec -> FilePath -> Maybe String -> Bool -> InitOptions
[_initGenoData] :: InitOptions -> GenotypeDataSpec
[_initPacPath] :: InitOptions -> FilePath
[_initPacName] :: InitOptions -> Maybe String
[_initMinimal] :: InitOptions -> Bool
runInit :: InitOptions -> PoseidonIO ()

module Poseidon.CLI.Xerxes.AdmixPops
data AdmixPopsMethodSettings
PerSNP :: Bool -> AdmixPopsMethodSettings
[_admixMarginalizeMissing] :: AdmixPopsMethodSettings -> Bool
InChunks :: Int -> AdmixPopsMethodSettings
[_admixChunkSize] :: AdmixPopsMethodSettings -> Int
data AdmixPopsOptions
AdmixPopsOptions :: [GenoDataSource] -> [RequestedInd] -> Maybe FilePath -> AdmixPopsMethodSettings -> GenotypeOutFormatSpec -> Bool -> FilePath -> Maybe String -> PlinkPopNameMode -> Bool -> AdmixPopsOptions
[_admixGenoSources] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> [GenoDataSource]
[_admixIndWithAdmixtureSet] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> [RequestedInd]
[_admixIndWithAdmixtureSetFile] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[_admixMethodSettings] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> AdmixPopsMethodSettings
[_admixOutFormat] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> GenotypeOutFormatSpec
[_admixOutZip] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> Bool
[_admixOutPath] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> FilePath
[_admixOutPacName] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> Maybe String
[_admixOutputPlinkPopMode] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> PlinkPopNameMode
[_admixOnlyLatest] :: AdmixPopsOptions -> Bool
runAdmixPops :: AdmixPopsOptions -> PoseidonIO ()
checkIndsWithAdmixtureSets :: [RequestedInd] -> IO ()
filterPackagesByPops :: [String] -> [PoseidonPackage] -> PoseidonIO [PoseidonPackage]
gatherInfoForInd :: RequestedInd -> [PoseidonPackage] -> PoseidonIO IndConcrete
extractIndsPerPop :: PopFrac -> [PoseidonPackage] -> PoseidonIO PopFracConcrete

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Validate

-- | A datatype representing command line options for the validate command
data ValidateOptions
ValidateOptions :: ValidatePlan -> [ByteString] -> [ByteString] -> Bool -> Bool -> ValidateOptions
[_validatePlan] :: ValidateOptions -> ValidatePlan
[_validateMandatoryJanno] :: ValidateOptions -> [ByteString]
[_validateMandatorySSF] :: ValidateOptions -> [ByteString]
[_validateNoExitCode] :: ValidateOptions -> Bool
[_validateOnlyLatest] :: ValidateOptions -> Bool
data ValidatePlan
ValPlanBaseDirs :: [FilePath] -> Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> ValidatePlan
[_valPlanBaseDirs] :: ValidatePlan -> [FilePath]
[_valPlanIgnoreGeno] :: ValidatePlan -> Bool
[_valPlanFullGeno] :: ValidatePlan -> Bool
[_valPlanIgnoreDuplicates] :: ValidatePlan -> Bool
[_valPlanIgnoreChecksums] :: ValidatePlan -> Bool
[_valPlanIgnorePosVersion] :: ValidatePlan -> Bool
ValPlanPoseidonYaml :: FilePath -> ValidatePlan
ValPlanGeno :: GenotypeDataSpec -> ValidatePlan
ValPlanJanno :: VersionedFile -> ValidatePlan
ValPlanSSF :: VersionedFile -> ValidatePlan
ValPlanBib :: FilePath -> ValidatePlan
runValidate :: ValidateOptions -> PoseidonIO ()
conclude :: Bool -> Bool -> PoseidonIO ()

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Serve
runServer :: ServeOptions -> MVar () -> PoseidonIO ()
runServerMainThread :: ServeOptions -> PoseidonIO ()
data ServeOptions
ServeOptions :: Either ArchiveConfig FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> Int -> Bool -> Maybe (FilePath, [FilePath], FilePath) -> ServeOptions
[cliArchiveConfig] :: ServeOptions -> Either ArchiveConfig FilePath
[cliZipDir] :: ServeOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[cliPort] :: ServeOptions -> Int
[cliIgnoreChecksums] :: ServeOptions -> Bool
[cliCertFiles] :: ServeOptions -> Maybe (FilePath, [FilePath], FilePath)
newtype ArchiveConfig
ArchiveConfig :: [ArchiveSpec] -> ArchiveConfig
data ArchiveSpec
ArchiveSpec :: ArchiveName -> [FilePath] -> Maybe String -> Maybe String -> Maybe String -> [String] -> Maybe FilePath -> ArchiveSpec
[_archSpecName] :: ArchiveSpec -> ArchiveName
[_archSpecPaths] :: ArchiveSpec -> [FilePath]
[_archSpecDescription] :: ArchiveSpec -> Maybe String
[_archSpecURL] :: ArchiveSpec -> Maybe String
[_archSpecDataURL] :: ArchiveSpec -> Maybe String
[_archSpecExcludePacsFromMap] :: ArchiveSpec -> [String]
[_archRetiredPackagesFile] :: ArchiveSpec -> Maybe FilePath
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Serve.ArchiveSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Serve.RetiredPac
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Serve.RetiredPackages

instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Serve.RetiredPackages
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Serve.RetiredPac
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Serve.ArchiveSpec

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.List

-- | The main function running the list command
runList :: ListOptions -> PoseidonIO ()

-- | A datatype representing command line options for the list command
data ListOptions
ListOptions :: RepoLocationSpec -> ListEntity -> Bool -> Bool -> ListOptions

-- | the list of base directories to search for packages
[_listRepoLocation] :: ListOptions -> RepoLocationSpec

-- | what to list
[_listListEntity] :: ListOptions -> ListEntity

-- | whether to output raw TSV instead of a nicely formatted table
[_listRawOutput] :: ListOptions -> Bool

-- | whether to show only latest versions of packages
[_listOnlyLatest] :: ListOptions -> Bool

-- | A datatype to represent the options what to list
data ListEntity
ListPackages :: Bool -> ListEntity
ListGroups :: ListEntity
ListIndividuals :: AddColSpec -> ListEntity
ListBibliography :: AddColSpec -> ListEntity
data RepoLocationSpec
RepoLocal :: [FilePath] -> RepoLocationSpec
RepoRemote :: ArchiveEndpoint -> RepoLocationSpec

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Genoconvert

-- | A datatype representing command line options for the validate command

[_genoconvertGenoSources] :: GenoconvertOptions -> [GenoDataSource]
[_genoConvertOutFormat] :: GenoconvertOptions -> GenotypeOutFormatSpec

[_genoconvertOutPlinkPopMode] :: GenoconvertOptions -> PlinkPopNameMode
[_genoconvertOnlyLatest] :: GenoconvertOptions -> Bool
[_genoconvertOutZip] :: GenoconvertOptions -> Bool

module Poseidon.CLI.Trident.Forge

-- | A datatype representing command line options for the survey command
data ForgeOptions
ForgeOptions :: [GenoDataSource] -> [EntityInput SignedEntity] -> Maybe FilePath -> Bool -> GenotypeOutFormatSpec -> ForgeOutMode -> Bool -> FilePath -> Maybe String -> Bool -> PlinkPopNameMode -> Bool -> ForgeOptions
[_forgeGenoSources] :: ForgeOptions -> [GenoDataSource]
[_forgeEntityInput] :: ForgeOptions -> [EntityInput SignedEntity]
[_forgeSnpFile] :: ForgeOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[_forgeIntersect] :: ForgeOptions -> Bool

[_forgeOutMode] :: ForgeOptions -> ForgeOutMode

[_forgePackageWise] :: ForgeOptions -> Bool
[_forgeOutputPlinkPopMode] :: ForgeOptions -> PlinkPopNameMode

-- | Different output modes ordered from more minimal to more complete

GenoOut :: ForgeOutMode
MinimalOut :: ForgeOutMode
PreservePymlOut :: ForgeOutMode
NormalOut :: ForgeOutMode
preservePyml :: ForgeOutMode -> Bool
pacReadOpts :: PackageReadOptions

-- | The main function running the forge command

filterSeqSourceRows :: JannoRows -> SeqSourceRows -> SeqSourceRows
filterBibEntries :: JannoRows -> BibTeX -> BibTeX

fillMissingReferenceAssemblyInfo :: [PoseidonPackage] -> PoseidonIO (Maybe String, Maybe String)

[_entityInput] :: FetchOptions -> [EntityInput PoseidonEntity]
[_archiveEnd] :: FetchOptions -> ArchiveEndpoint
