module Poseidon.Analysis.Utils

-- | A datatype representing the two options for how to run the
--   Block-Jackknife
data JackknifeMode
JackknifePerN :: Int -> JackknifeMode
JackknifePerChromosome :: JackknifeMode

-- | A helper type to represent a genomic position.
type GenomPos = (Chrom, Int)
type GroupDef = (String, SignedEntitiesList)
type PloidyVec = Vector JannoGenotypePloidy
addGroupDefs :: [GroupDef] -> [PoseidonPackage] -> [PoseidonPackage]
parseGroupDefsFromJSON :: Object -> Parser [GroupDef]
computeAlleleCount :: GenoLine -> PloidyVec -> [String] -> [Int] -> (Int, Int)

-- | This is the original Delete-mj Jackknife based on Busing et al. 1999.
--   The notation is the same. theta_n is the full estimate. m_j is the
--   weights of block j. theta_j is the estimate based on the j'th block
--   removed.
computeAlleleFreq :: GenoLine -> PloidyVec -> [String] -> [Int] -> Maybe Double

-- | A simplified Jackknife formula based on an additive estimate, in which
--   the full estimate equals the Jackknife estimate
computeJackknifeOriginal :: Double -> [Double] -> [Double] -> (Double, Double)
computeJackknifeAdditive :: [Int] -> [Double] -> (Double, Double)
filterTransitions :: Monad m => Bool -> Pipe (EigenstratSnpEntry, a) (EigenstratSnpEntry, a) m r
data XerxesException
PopConfigYamlException :: FilePath -> String -> XerxesException
GroupDefException :: String -> XerxesException
FStatException :: String -> XerxesException
makePloidyVec :: JannoRows -> PoseidonIO PloidyVec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.Utils.JackknifeMode
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.Utils.XerxesException
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Poseidon.Analysis.Utils.XerxesException

module Poseidon.Analysis.RASconfig
data PopConfig
PopConfigYamlStruct :: [GroupDef] -> EntitiesList -> EntitiesList -> Maybe PoseidonEntity -> PopConfig
[popConfigGroupDef] :: PopConfig -> [GroupDef]
[popConfigLefts] :: PopConfig -> EntitiesList
[popConfigRights] :: PopConfig -> EntitiesList
[popConfigOutgroup] :: PopConfig -> Maybe PoseidonEntity
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Analysis.RASconfig.PopConfig

module Poseidon.CLI.Xerxes.RAS
data FreqSpec
FreqNone :: FreqSpec
FreqK :: Int -> FreqSpec
FreqX :: Double -> FreqSpec
data RASOptions
RASOptions :: [FilePath] -> JackknifeMode -> [Chrom] -> FilePath -> FreqSpec -> FreqSpec -> Double -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe Int -> Bool -> Maybe FilePath -> RASOptions
[_rasBaseDirs] :: RASOptions -> [FilePath]
[_rasJackknifeMode] :: RASOptions -> JackknifeMode
[_rasExcludeChroms] :: RASOptions -> [Chrom]
[_rasPopConfig] :: RASOptions -> FilePath
[_rasMinFreq] :: RASOptions -> FreqSpec
[_rasMaxFreq] :: RASOptions -> FreqSpec
[_rasMaxMissingness] :: RASOptions -> Double
[_rasBlockTableFile] :: RASOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[_rasF4tableOutFile] :: RASOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[_rasMaxSnps] :: RASOptions -> Maybe Int
[_rasNoTransitions] :: RASOptions -> Bool
[_rasBedFile] :: RASOptions -> Maybe FilePath
data BlockData
BlockData :: GenomPos -> GenomPos -> [Int] -> [[Double]] -> BlockData
[blockStartPos] :: BlockData -> GenomPos
[blockEndPos] :: BlockData -> GenomPos
[blockSiteCount] :: BlockData -> [Int]
[blockVals] :: BlockData -> [[Double]]
data BlockAccumulator
BlockAccumulator :: Maybe GenomPos -> Maybe GenomPos -> IOVector Int -> IOVector Double -> BlockAccumulator
[blockAccStart] :: BlockAccumulator -> Maybe GenomPos
[blockAccEnd] :: BlockAccumulator -> Maybe GenomPos
[blockAccSiteCount] :: BlockAccumulator -> IOVector Int
[blockAccVals] :: BlockAccumulator -> IOVector Double
runRAS :: RASOptions -> PoseidonIO ()
weightedAverage :: [Double] -> [Double] -> Double
readPopConfig :: FilePath -> PoseidonIO PopConfig
buildRasFold :: MonadIO m => [PoseidonPackage] -> FreqSpec -> FreqSpec -> Double -> Maybe PoseidonEntity -> EntitiesList -> EntitiesList -> PoseidonIO (FoldM m (EigenstratSnpEntry, GenoLine) BlockData)
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.CLI.Xerxes.RAS.FreqSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.CLI.Xerxes.RAS.RASOptions
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.CLI.Xerxes.RAS.BlockData

module Poseidon.Core.Chronicle
data PoseidonPackageChronicle
PoseidonPackageChronicle :: String -> Maybe String -> Version -> Day -> Set PackageIteration -> PoseidonPackageChronicle
[snapYamlTitle] :: PoseidonPackageChronicle -> String
[snapYamlDescription] :: PoseidonPackageChronicle -> Maybe String
[snapYamlChronicleVersion] :: PoseidonPackageChronicle -> Version
[snapYamlLastModified] :: PoseidonPackageChronicle -> Day
[snapYamlPackages] :: PoseidonPackageChronicle -> Set PackageIteration

-- | A data type to represent a package state
data PackageIteration
PackageIteration :: String -> Version -> String -> FilePath -> PackageIteration

-- | the title of the package
[pacStateTitle] :: PackageIteration -> String

-- | the version of the package
[pacStateVersion] :: PackageIteration -> Version

-- | the hash of a relevant commit where a package can be accessed in this
--   version
[pacStateCommit] :: PackageIteration -> String

-- | the file path where the POSEIDON.yml file is stored
[pacStatePath] :: PackageIteration -> FilePath
updateChronicle :: PoseidonPackageChronicle -> PoseidonPackageChronicle -> PoseidonPackageChronicle
readChronicle :: FilePath -> PoseidonIO PoseidonPackageChronicle
writeChronicle :: FilePath -> PoseidonPackageChronicle -> PoseidonIO ()
makeChronicle :: FilePath -> [PoseidonPackage] -> PoseidonIO PoseidonPackageChronicle
chroniclePackages :: FilePath -> [PoseidonPackage] -> PoseidonIO (Set PackageIteration)
getPackageVersion :: PoseidonPackage -> PoseidonIO Version
getGitCommitHash :: FilePath -> PoseidonIO String
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PackageIteration
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PoseidonPackageChronicle
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PoseidonPackageChronicle
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PoseidonPackageChronicle
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PoseidonPackageChronicle
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PackageIteration
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PackageIteration
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PackageIteration
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PackageIteration
instance Poseidon.Core.EntityTypes.HasNameAndVersion Poseidon.Core.Chronicle.PackageIteration

module Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig

-- | A datatype to represent different types of F-Statistics
data FStatType
F4 :: FStatType
F3 :: FStatType
F3star :: FStatType
F2 :: FStatType
PWM :: FStatType
Het :: FStatType
FSTvanilla :: FStatType
FST :: FStatType
F3vanilla :: FStatType
F2vanilla :: FStatType

-- | A datatype to represent F-Statistics to be computed from genotype
--   data.
data FStatSpec
FStatSpec :: FStatType -> [PoseidonEntity] -> Maybe AscertainmentSpec -> FStatSpec
data AscertainmentSpec
AscertainmentSpec :: Maybe PoseidonEntity -> PoseidonEntity -> Double -> Double -> AscertainmentSpec
[ascOutgroupSpec] :: AscertainmentSpec -> Maybe PoseidonEntity
[ascRefgroupSpec] :: AscertainmentSpec -> PoseidonEntity
[ascLowerFreqSpec] :: AscertainmentSpec -> Double
[ascUpperFreqSpec] :: AscertainmentSpec -> Double
data FStatInput
FStatInputDirect :: FStatSpec -> FStatInput
FStatInputYaml :: FilePath -> FStatInput
FStatInputSimpleText :: FilePath -> FStatInput
data FStatConfigYaml
FStatConfigYaml :: [GroupDef] -> [MultiFStatSpec] -> FStatConfigYaml
[fcGroupDefs] :: FStatConfigYaml -> [GroupDef]
[fcFStatSpecs] :: FStatConfigYaml -> [MultiFStatSpec]
data MultiFStatSpec
MultiFStatSpec :: FStatType -> [PoseidonEntity] -> [PoseidonEntity] -> [PoseidonEntity] -> [PoseidonEntity] -> Maybe AscertainmentSpec -> MultiFStatSpec
[mFstatType] :: MultiFStatSpec -> FStatType
[mFstatSlotA] :: MultiFStatSpec -> [PoseidonEntity]
[mFstatSlotB] :: MultiFStatSpec -> [PoseidonEntity]
[mFstatSlotC] :: MultiFStatSpec -> [PoseidonEntity]
[mFstatSlotD] :: MultiFStatSpec -> [PoseidonEntity]
[mFstatAscertainment] :: MultiFStatSpec -> Maybe AscertainmentSpec
processYamlConfig :: FStatConfigYaml -> Either XerxesException ([GroupDef], [FStatSpec])
readFstatsYamlConfig :: MonadIO m => FilePath -> m ([GroupDef], [FStatSpec])

-- | A parser to parse Summary Statistic specifications from the simple
--   text file input. Every line is one statistics. No ascertainment can be
--   given with this interface.
fStatSpecParser :: Parser FStatSpec
fstatSlotLength :: FStatType -> Int
readFStatsSimpleText :: MonadIO m => FilePath -> m [FStatSpec]
readFstatInput :: MonadIO m => [FStatInput] -> m ([GroupDef], [FStatSpec])
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.FStatType
instance GHC.Read.Read Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.FStatType
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.FStatType
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.AscertainmentSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.AscertainmentSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.FStatSpec
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.FStatSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.MultiFStatSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.FStatConfigYaml
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.FStatConfigYaml
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.MultiFStatSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.AscertainmentSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Poseidon.Analysis.FStatsConfig.FStatType

module Poseidon.CLI.Xerxes.FStats

-- | A datatype to represent F-Statistics to be computed from genotype
--   data.
data FStatSpec
FStatSpec :: FStatType -> [PoseidonEntity] -> Maybe AscertainmentSpec -> FStatSpec

-- | The abstract data type <tt>ParseError</tt> represents parse errors. It
--   provides the source position (<a>SourcePos</a>) of the error and a
--   list of error messages (<a>Message</a>). A <tt>ParseError</tt> can be
--   returned by the function <a>parse</a>. <tt>ParseError</tt> is an
--   instance of the <a>Show</a> and <a>Eq</a> classes.
data () => ParseError

-- | The most general way to run a parser over the Identity monad.
--   <tt>runParser p state filePath input</tt> runs parser <tt>p</tt> on
--   the input list of tokens <tt>input</tt>, obtained from source
--   <tt>filePath</tt> with the initial user state <tt>st</tt>. The
--   <tt>filePath</tt> is only used in error messages and may be the empty
--   string. Returns either a <a>ParseError</a> (<a>Left</a>) or a value of
--   type <tt>a</tt> (<a>Right</a>).
--   
--   <pre>
--   parseFromFile p fname
--     = do{ input &lt;- readFile fname
--         ; return (runParser p () fname input)
--         }
--   </pre>
runParser :: Stream s Identity t => Parsec s u a -> u -> SourceName -> s -> Either ParseError a

-- | A datatype representing the command line options for the F-Statistics
--   command
data FstatsOptions
FstatsOptions :: [FilePath] -> JackknifeMode -> [Chrom] -> [FStatInput] -> Maybe Int -> Bool -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> FstatsOptions

-- | the list of base directories to search for packages ^ The way the
--   Jackknife is performed
[_foBaseDirs] :: FstatsOptions -> [FilePath]

-- | The way the Jackknife is performed ^ a list of chromosome names to
--   exclude from the computation
[_foJackknifeMode] :: FstatsOptions -> JackknifeMode

-- | a list of chromosome names to exclude from the computation ^ A list of
--   F-statistics to compute
[_foExcludeChroms] :: FstatsOptions -> [Chrom]

-- | A list of F-statistics to compute, entered directly or via files
[_foStatInput] :: FstatsOptions -> [FStatInput]
[_foMaxSnps] :: FstatsOptions -> Maybe Int
[_foNoTransitions] :: FstatsOptions -> Bool
[_foTableOut] :: FstatsOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[_foBlockTableOut] :: FstatsOptions -> Maybe FilePath

-- | A datatype representing the two options for how to run the
--   Block-Jackknife
data JackknifeMode
JackknifePerN :: Int -> JackknifeMode
JackknifePerChromosome :: JackknifeMode

-- | The main function running the FStats command.
runFstats :: FstatsOptions -> PoseidonIO ()
collectStatSpecGroups :: [FStatSpec] -> [PoseidonEntity]
instance GHC.Show.Show Poseidon.CLI.Xerxes.FStats.BlockData
